issues.description: Condition missing: effect requires Leader to have {Galley-La Company} type, but DSL has Always. Should be LeaderHasType:Galley-La Company
Action incomplete: GiveDon only adds DON cards but does not rest them. Effect text states 'rest it' — need additional Rest action or GiveDon must support rest parameter
Source missing: effect specifies DON cards come from 'your DON!! deck' (SearchDeck behavior), not generic GiveDon. Should clarify deck source
